name: Matt Schaefer

contactInfo.office: Texas Capitol Extension, Room E2.306, Austin, TX 78701

bio: Matt Schaefer represents House District 6 in the Texas House of Representatives, covering Henderson and Anderson counties along with parts of Smith and Cherokee counties in the Tyler area. An attorney and Army veteran, Schaefer has served in the legislature since 2013. He is recognized as one of the most conservative members of the Texas House, championing constitutional carry, pro-life legislation, and fiscal restraint.
campaignPromises: Eliminate property tax and shift to consumption-based taxation
Defend the right to life from conception
Oppose all forms of gun control at the state level
Reduce the size and scope of state government
Secure the Texas border and enforce immigration laws
